'''vayuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waakye|waakye]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waakye|waakye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vayuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væyirith|væyirith]] || [[word:væyirij|væyirij]] || [[word:væyirish|væyirish]] || [[word:væyiri|væyiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vayuyuruth|vayuyuruth]] || [[word:vayuyuruj|vayuyuruj]] || [[word:vayuyurush|vayuyurush]] || [[word:vayuyuru|vayuyuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vayuruth|vayuruth]] || [[word:vayuruj|vayuruj]] || [[word:vayurush|vayurush]] || [[word:vayuru|vayuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vayufruth|vayufruth]] || [[word:vayufruj|vayufruj]] || [[word:vayufrush|vayufrush]] || [[word:vayufruf|vayufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vayuruthu|vayuruthu]] || [[word:vayuruju|vayuruju]] || [[word:vayurushu|vayurushu]] || [[word:vayuruku|vayuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vayuruth|vayuruth]] || [[word:vayuruj|vayuruj]] || [[word:vayurush|vayurush]] || [[word:vayuru|vayuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vayuruthul|vayuruthul]] || [[word:vayurujul|vayurujul]] || [[word:vayurushul|vayurushul]] || [[word:vayurukul|vayurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vayuruthuthu|vayuruthuthu]] || [[word:vayurujuju|vayurujuju]] || [[word:vayurushushu|vayurushushu]] || [[word:vayuruku|vayuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vayuruthun|vayuruthun]] || [[word:vayurujun|vayurujun]] || [[word:vayurushun|vayurushun]] || [[word:vayurukun|vayurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vayuruthuoro|vayuruthuoro]] || [[word:vayurujuoro|vayurujuoro]] || [[word:vayurushuoro|vayurushuoro]] || [[word:vayurukuoro|vayurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
